data.title: Dress for Success Southern Nevada to Host 2026 Success Showcase Luncheon
data.description: A significant event is set to take place in Las Vegas on April 17, 2026, as Dress for Success Southern Nevada will be organizing its annual Success Showcase Luncheon. The event aims to shine a spotlight on client transformation stories, underscoring the impact the organization has had on women in the region. By sharing these success stories, Dress for Success hopes to raise critical funds to further support women in need across Southern Nevada. This event is crucial for the organization's mission to serve more women and expand its reach. The important numbers include the date of the luncheon (April 17, 2026) and the geographical area of focus (Southern Nevada).

data.title: Ridgetech, Inc. Announces 1-for-150 Reverse Share Split
data.description: Ridgetech, Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol RDGT, based in Hangzhou, China, has revealed plans for a reverse share split. The wholesale distributor of pharmaceutical and healthcare products in China aims to execute a 1-for-150 reverse share split. This move is anticipated to consolidate the shares of the Company, potentially impacting their stock value.

data.title: University of Phoenix Wins Six 2026 ADDY® Awards Including Three Golds in for Creative Excellence Across Video, Digital and Documentary Storytelling
data.description: University of Phoenix has achieved success in the American Advertising Awards, also known as ADDY® Awards, by winning a total of six awards. Among these accolades are three Gold ADDY® Awards. This achievement has allowed them to advance to the next level of the competition, the District-level American Advertising Awards. The awards were received from the Phoenix Chapter, with the results announced on April 3, 2026.

data.title: Proposed appointment to the Board of Directors at the Annual General Meeting on May 21st, 2026: Thierry Fournier candidate director – Appointed censor with immediate effect
data.description: Thierry Fournier has been nominated as a candidate director for the Board of Directors at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026. Following the meeting, Fournier has been appointed as a censor with immediate effect.

data.title: Hospitality Adds 44,000 Jobs in March with Second-Strongest Private Sector Growth - OysterLink
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 3, 2026, it was reported that the leisure and hospitality industry saw significant growth by adding 44,000 jobs in March. This was a noteworthy rebound from the previous month's loss of 11,000 jobs. These findings were based on an analysis conducted by OysterLink using the latest data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics. Despite not being the fastest-growing sector, the hospitality industry showed promising improvement.

data.title: Citigroup Inc. sends out participation notices to its customers.
data.description: In a recent development, an increase in the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has been reported in the country. Health officials have confirmed a total of 5,000 new cases in the last 24 hours, bringing the total number of cases to 150,000. The surge in cases has raised concerns among the public and authorities, leading to calls for stricter measures to control the spread of the virus. Additionally, the number of active cases has also seen a significant rise, with 10,000 individuals currently under treatment. Hospitals are reportedly operating at full capacity to accommodate the increasing number of patients, prompting officials to urge the public to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols to curb the spread of the virus.

data.description: The Board of Akcinė prekybos bendrovė "APRANGA" has proposed a draft agenda and draft resolutions for the upcoming Annual General Meeting of shareholders scheduled for April 30, 2026.
